code_refs.description: Public read command that exposes one deterministic tree view over the induced graph.
Linear inputs produce a flat atom-chain root with matching width.
Later rereads can refine earlier flat roots into tighter compound decompositions.
Repeated known blocks collapse to reused subpatterns and keep single-character reads atomic.
Infix rereads can introduce reusable subpatterns and alternative decompositions.
Triple-repeat overlaps produce both valid binary decompositions of the root.
Complex overlapping inputs accumulate the full regression-corpus decomposition set.
Rotating overlap cases can accumulate multiple compatible decompositions on related roots.
PatternReadResult and ReadNode expose only one deterministic tree even when the graph stores multiple child patterns.
